general.prompt: Apple's suing OpenAI for stealing talent—what's the fancy term for that when your geniuses jump ship to a rival?
options: Poaching with golden handcuffs
Bypassing federal election agencies
Astral projection patents
Trade secret theft
general.summary: Apple is suing OpenAI for trade secret theft after losing key talent to the AI lab preparing to launch its first hardware device.

general.prompt: Your horoscope says you'll meet a mysterious stranger, but for July 11, 2026, what's the real cosmic scoop?
options: Daily zodiac predictions
A sudden windfall from a long-lost uncle
Alien landing in your backyard
A small plane crash in the Bahamas
general.summary: The horoscope for July 11, 2026, offers daily astrological predictions for each zodiac sign.

general.prompt: A small plane crashes in the Bahamas on independence day—what's the tragic toll?
options: 10 people killed
Mexican builder shot by ICE officer
A colony of friendly dolphins rescued
Only the pilot's ego wounded
general.summary: A small plane crash in the Bahamas killed 10 people on the country's independence day.

general.prompt: Trump wanted to bypass the federal election agency—what creative excuse did the White House cook up?
options: Blaming it on a rogue AI chatbot
Declaring a national emergency over voting machine vulnerabilities
Suing OpenAI for trade secret theft
Claiming the election was rigged by time travelers
general.summary: The White House explored declaring a national emergency over alleged voting machine vulnerabilities before Trump ousted election agency leaders.

general.prompt: A Mexican builder shot by an ICE officer is mourned—what was his American dream?
options: Inventing a jetpack for commuters
Surviving a small plane crash in the Bahamas
Opening a chain of taco trucks
Building hundreds of houses over 35 years
general.summary: Lorenzo Salgado Araujo, a Mexican builder fatally shot by an ICE officer, built hundreds of houses in Houston over 35 years.

tech.prompt: Ahoy, matey! After 13 years, we finally got a remastered pirate adventure. But is it worth the wait or just a shipwreck?
options: Only if you like swimming with digital sharks for hours
Yes, it's a ground-up remake worth playing
The wait was worth it because it fixes the terrible Roku update
No, it's just a new ship skin for Fortnite
tech.summary: The BBC's Tom Gerken reviews the remade Assassin's Creed Black Flag, calling it a ground-up remake.

tech.prompt: Apple's Mail app is getting a glow-up in iOS 27! What's the big new feature that'll finally make you check your inbox?
options: Emails now delivered by carrier pigeon animation
AI-powered search improvements
A new 'vibes' filter that sorts emails by mood
It now supports speedrunning your inbox like a pro
tech.summary: iOS 27 brings improved search and AI features to Apple's Mail app.

tech.prompt: Santa Monica Studio is revving up for a new God of War! But when will Kratos finally grace our consoles?
options: It's delayed because of a terrible Roku update
Next Tuesday, but only on the Apple Mail app
2050, after Kratos becomes a beach bum
tech.summary: Santa Monica Studio confirmed God of War Laufey will have a physical disc release, suggesting a 2027 launch.

tech.prompt: Roku just dropped a new update and... surprise! Everyone hates it. What's the main complaint?
options: It removes the Mail app integration from iOS 27
Too many ads and algorithm changes
It now requires you to watch a cat video before every app
The remote now only works if you solve a math problem
tech.summary: Kotaku reports that a new Roku update is widely hated for pushing ads and algorithm nonsense.

tech.prompt: Summer Games Fest Done Quick is a speedrunner's paradise! What kind of gaming feats can you watch right now?
options: Someone beating Skyrim by only using the Mail app
Speedruns of various games
A single run of 'Pong' that lasts 48 hours
A speedrun of the God of War Laufey disc installation
tech.summary: Kotaku highlights 8 incredible speedruns available to watch from Summer Games Fest Done Quick.

business.prompt: Oregon's AG was digging into the Paramount-Warner Bros. merger like a detective at a donut shop. What did they want?
options: A free lifetime supply of popcorn and movie tickets
Trade secrets about Apple's new AI features
Records related to federal lobbying activity
A formal apology from the studios for making too many sequels
business.summary: Oregon's attorney general sought records related to federal lobbying activity in the Paramount-Warner Bros. Discovery merger.

business.prompt: Apple and OpenAI are going to court! What did Apple accuse OpenAI of doing?
options: Using Apple's designs to build a smarter toaster
Hacking into Siri to make her sing Taylor Swift songs on repeat
Dropping demand for records in a merger case
Stealing trade secrets
business.summary: Apple sued OpenAI, alleging the AI company stole trade secrets.

business.prompt: Trump is hyping a $250B Micron investment like it's the biggest thing since sliced bread. How many jobs is it supposed to create?
options: Exactly 1 job for a very busy shoveler
Over 250,000 jobs, mostly in AI development
50,000 jobs and a lifetime supply of microchips
business.summary: Micron Technology's $250 billion investment will create 100,000 American jobs across semiconductor facilities in New York, Idaho and Virginia.

business.prompt: Global oil demand is taking a nosedive, but U.S. drivers are still guzzling gas like it's 1999. What's the expected drop in global demand by 2026?
options: About 1 million barrels per day
Zero barrels – we're all switching to hamster wheels
500,000 barrels per day, but only on weekends
2 million barrels per day, thanks to Meta's AI backlash
business.summary: Global oil demand is set to decline by about 1 million barrels per day by 2026 due to higher oil prices and supply disruptions.

business.prompt: Meta's Instagram AI feature was so unpopular they pulled it faster than a bad tweet. What was the feature supposed to do?
options: Turn all photos into cat memes automatically
Help users find the perfect filter for their brunch pics
Be a useful creative tool
Steal trade secrets from Apple's latest iPhone
business.summary: Meta removed a controversial AI feature on Instagram after backlash, stating it was intended to be a useful creative tool.

sports.prompt: England's playing Norway in Miami's heat – are they about to melt or will they bring the ice? What's the big weather worry?
options: Haaland's 'babygirl' charm
Norway's secret ice weapons
Snowstorm in Miami
Searing heat in Miami
sports.summary: England faces Norway in Miami with searing temperatures at the World Cup.

sports.prompt: Conor McGregor's back! He made weight for his fight against Holloway – but when was his last fight?
options: Right after the Kawhi trade
He never stopped fighting
sports.summary: Conor McGregor made weight for UFC 329 against Holloway, his first fight since 2021.

sports.prompt: Erling Haaland is Norway's World Cup machine and the internet's 'babygirl' – how many goals has he scored in four matches?
options: Seven goals
Zero goals, all assists
One goal but 100 memes
Fourteen goals
sports.summary: Erling Haaland scored seven goals in four World Cup matches and is called 'babygirl' online.

sports.prompt: MLB Pipeline's final mock draft has the White Sox picking No. 1 – what's their big dilemma?
options: Trading the pick for a pizza
McGregor's comeback distraction
Choosing a player who can also pitch
Deciding between two players
sports.summary: The White Sox will decide between two players with the No. 1 pick in the MLB draft.

sports.prompt: Raptors notes: Kawhi trade on hold – what's the latest on the deal?
options: Raptors adding a draft pick
Trade cancelled for a snow day
Norway's heat advantage
Terms not expected to change
sports.summary: The terms of the Kawhi Leonard trade are not expected to change despite being put on hold.

science.prompt: Dark energy just flipped its sign like a bad politician—so why won't the Hubble tension shut up?
options: Universe expands, but only on weekends now
Dark energy flips sign, Hubble tension remains
Hubble telescope spots a 23-million-light-year-long galactic structure
Dark energy throws a party, Hubble tension invited but refused to budge
science.summary: Astronomers discovered dark energy may have flipped sign, but the Hubble constant disagreement persists.

science.prompt: Break out the tiny umbrellas! Webb found what might be a stinky ocean world—but is that 'life' or just bad gas?
options: Deep-sea robot finds massive unexpected structure in Atlantic
Dimethyl sulfide hints on K2-18b, but disputed
Global ocean with hydrogen atmosphere, but smell TBD
Alien farts detected, NASA confirms
science.summary: Webb hints at dimethyl sulfide on exoplanet K2-18b, but independent analyses dispute the finding.

science.prompt: A deep-sea robot dove into the Atlantic's Doldrums and came back with more than just soggy batteries—what did it find?
options: Lab-grown sperm from stem cells on a mouse kidney
Atlantis, but it was just a sunken cruise ship
A massive patch of plastic shaped like a whale
Hydrothermal vents, weird fish, and rare squid
science.summary: Robots in the mid-Atlantic found hydrothermal vents, translucent-skull fish, and rare squid.

science.prompt: Forget the highway—this galactic structure is 23 million light-years long and our brains are melting. What is it?
options: A cosmic filament of galaxies
A huge galactic structure 23 million light-years long
The universe's longest traffic jam
Dark energy flipping its sign and refusing to budge
science.summary: Scientists discovered a massive galactic structure 23 million light-years long.

science.prompt: Move over, test tubes—scientists grew sperm on a mouse's kidney and you won't believe what happened next!
options: Lab-grown sperm from stem cells on mouse kidney
Fertility breakthrough inches closer to reality
Deep-sea robot finds hydrothermal vents in Atlantic
Mouse gave birth to a human baby, headlines explode
science.summary: Scientists created immature human sperm from stem cells using a mouse kidney as a bioreactor.
